zoning_excerpt: Single-family residential district. No retail storefronts. Off-street parking required for dwellings with more than two units.
notes: Parking required for >2 units.

zoning_excerpt: Neighborhood commercial. Retail and personal services permitted. Residential uses prohibited above ground floor except by special permit.
notes: Retail/services permitted; residential only with special permit.

zoning_excerpt: Light industrial. Manufacturing and warehousing allowed. No schools or daycare centers.
notes: Light industrial, no schools/daycares.

zoning_excerpt: Mixed-use overlay. Ground floor may be commercial or office; upper floors residential. Shared parking may satisfy minimums if approved.
notes: Mixed-use overlay: commercial ground floor, residential above.

zoning_excerpt: Multifamily residential. Three to six stories. Ground-floor cafe allowed only if accessory to building.
notes: Multifamily residential; accessory cafe permitted.

zoning_excerpt: Open space and recreation. Public parks and trails; temporary event structures with permit. No permanent dwellings.
notes: Open space; temporary events with permit; no permanent dwellings.

zoning_excerpt: General commercial. Restaurants, clinics, and small offices permitted. No heavy manufacturing.
notes: General commercial; restaurants, clinics, small offices permitted.

zoning_excerpt: Planned unit development. Master plan allows cluster housing plus one neighborhood grocery not exceeding 5000 sq ft.
notes: PUD: cluster housing plus small grocery <=5000 sq ft.

zoning_excerpt: Synthetic grid parcel; single-family residential pattern for batching demos.
notes: Synthetic grid single-family residential pattern.
